title: dryopteris cicutaria
intro: Dryopteris cicutaria, also known as the lady fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of lady fern include the ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and even aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Lady fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and use in traditional medicine.
